reasoning: The control AC-4(8) focuses on enforcing information flow policies, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to network security controls such as NetworkPolicies and Ingress configurations. NetworkPolicies can enforce ingress and egress restrictions, ensuring that only authorized traffic is allowed. Additionally, enabling TLS for Ingress and mutual TLS (mTLS) in service meshes like Istio can enforce secure communication channels, aligning with the control's intent to enforce security and privacy policy filters.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | security and privacy policy filters (a) enforce i
